---
title: "Drivers and CH4"
author: "Abby Lewis"
date: "2024-08-22"
output: html_document
---

Load data and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)

ch4 <- read_csv(here::here("01_Data", "ch4.csv"))
```

```{r}
ch4 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DateTime_EST, y = Depth_cm)) +
  geom_line()

ch4 %>%
  summarize(n_flooded = sum(Depth_cm > 0, na.rm = T) / sum(!is.na(Depth_cm)))
```
